default_routes.comment: Backup to Spectrum if ATT fails

entries.comment: Route to ATT public gateway for check-gateway
Route to AT&T gateway via WAN-ATT
Backup to Spectrum if ATT fails

entries.name: BackupAndUpdate
HostDown
entries.source:
/tool e-mail send \
to="kevin.blalock@gmail.com" \
subject="HOST DOWN" \
body="HOST DOWN"

entries.name: HostUp
entries.source:
/tool e-mail send \
to="kevin.blalock@gmail.com" \
subject="HOST UP" \
body="HOST UP"

entries.name: wan-latency-test
entries.source:
:put "=== Spectrum WAN to 1.1.1.1 ==="
/tool flood-ping 1.1.1.1 count=50 src-address=70.123.224.1
:put ""
:put "=== ATT WAN to 1.1.1.1 ==="
/tool flood-ping 1.1.1.1 count=50 src-address=99.126.112.1
:put ""
:put "=== Spectrum WAN to 8.8.8.8 ==="
/tool flood-ping 8.8.8.8 count=50 src-address=70.123.224.1
:put ""
:put "=== ATT WAN to 8.8.8.8 ==="
/tool flood-ping 8.8.8.8 count=50 src-address=99.126.112.1

entries.name: fetch_att_modem
entries.source:
:local result [/tool fetch url="http://192.168.2.254" mode=http as-value output=user]
:put ($result->"data")

entries.name: test_att_tcp
entries.source:
:log info "Testing ATT connectivity with TCP"
:local result [/tool fetch url="http://1.1.1.1" mode=http src-address=99.126.115.47 as-value output=user]
:put ($result->"status")
:put ($result->"data")

entries.name: test_spectrum_latency
test_att_latency
temp_export_1765055007
entries.source: /export verbose file=backup_1765055007

entries.name: qos-dashboard
qos-dashboard-2
blizzard-update
steam-update
script1
Disable-Spectrum
entries.source: /ip route disable [find comment="Spectrum"]

entries.name: Enable-Spectrum
entries.source:
:delay 5s
/ip route enable [find comment="Spectrum"]

entries.name: Disable-ATT
entries.source:
/ip route disable [find comment="ATT"]
/ip route disable [find comment="Force ATT_OUT to ATT WAN"]

entries.name: Enable-ATT
entries.source:
:delay 5s
/ip route enable [find comment="ATT"]
/ip route enable [find comment="Force ATT_OUT to ATT WAN"]

entries.name: game-qos-engine
test-valid
entries.source: :log info "test"
